title: AI Customer Support Chatbot
description: An intelligent chatbot built with Python and OpenAI API, capable of handling customer queries, escalating complex issues, and learning from interactions. Features context memory and sentiment analysis.

title: Shout Connect Portal
description: A full-stack web portal developed during work placement at Shout Connect. Integrates with a PostgreSQL database and features real-time updates for service management.

title: Task Manager Pro
description: A responsive task management application with drag-and-drop functionality, priority sorting, deadline tracking, and local storage persistence.

title: Python Data Analyser
description: A data analysis toolkit using Pandas and Matplotlib to visualise CSV datasets. Features automatic chart generation, statistical summaries, and export to PDF reports.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce solution with product management, shopping cart, payment integration simulation, and an admin dashboard.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Real-time weather application consuming OpenWeatherMap API. Features 7-day forecasts, interactive maps, location search, and weather alerts.

title: Student Grade Tracker
description: A Python desktop application for tracking student grades across modules. Generates performance reports, visualisations, and predicts final grades based on current progress.

title: Portfolio Website v1
description: My first personal portfolio website built from scratch using HTML, CSS and JavaScript. Features responsive design and smooth animations.

title: Quiz Application
description: An interactive quiz platform with multiple categories, difficulty levels, timer functionality, and score leaderboards stored in localStorage.

title: Inventory Management System
description: A database-driven inventory system for small businesses. Features stock tracking, low-stock alerts, supplier management, and PDF invoice generation.

title: Recipe Finder App
description: A recipe discovery application that uses the Spoonacular API to find recipes based on ingredients you have at home. Includes dietary filters and meal planning.

title: Sentiment Analysis Tool
description: A Python NLP tool that analyses the sentiment of text input using NLTK and TextBlob. Can process bulk text files and generate sentiment reports.
